message:
Running command: export PATH="$PATH:/home/user/.local/bin"

PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
SOC_CONFIG="$PROJECT_ROOT/config/soc_config.yaml"
PDK_ROOT="/nc/apps/pdk"
NC_LIB_ROOT="$PROJECT_ROOT/ip"

echo "=== Executing nc_chipgen (direct invocation — tool has no 'generate' subcommand) ==="
echo ""

nc_chipgen \
    --soc-config "$SOC_CONFIG" \
    --out         "$PROJECT_ROOT" \
    --pdk-root    "$PDK_ROOT" \
    --nc-lib-root "$NC_LIB_ROOT" \
    --skip-synth 2>&1

RETCODE=$?
echo ""
echo "=== nc_chipgen exited with code: $RETCODE ==="
